subject: Release tca-gen2 1.3.0
commit_message:
Release tca-gen2 1.3.0

Changes:
- Remove vulnerabilities
  - Spring Boot 2.0.9.RELEASE > 2.4.4
  - SpringFox 2.9.2 > 3.0.0
  - Dcaegen2 SDK 1.3.3 > 1.5.0
- Change openjdk baseOS img to integration-java11

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2590
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2654
Issue-ID: INT-1864
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2420
Signed-off-by: Remigiusz Janeczek <remigiusz.janeczek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I2f274f198d54d5e878fc7506c651a2565275d08a

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Thanks Remi for test & rls submission

No problem. Btw, I guess we want to keep the bootstrap blueprints up to date, but release and merge that into OOM at the end of Istanbul? (now only dcaegen2-services update will suffice?)

Also the merge job seems to be broken, I think it's because the maven-deploy-plugin:2.8.2 is incompatibile with mvn33, so we could update the jenkins job to use mvn35 (preferred probably) or change the plugin to version 2.8.
Created a jira for that: https://jira.onap.org/browse/DCAEGEN2-2797 , I'll probably look into it tomorrow or next week.

> Created a jira for that: https://jira.onap.org/browse/DCAEGEN2-2797 , I'll probably look into it tomorrow or next week.

Sounds good.. Reg tca version - this can be updated in oom for both for helm and bootstrap (this will override whats set in blueprint). Actual blueprint revision can also be submitted now however will wait toward M3 for consolidated bootstrap container revision and release.
